steps.expected: Page loads with DataTable showing roles
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with DataTable showing 5 roles
GET /api/v1/admin/roles returns 200 with { success: true, data: [5 role objects] }. Response includes ROLE_ADMIN, ROLE_ACCOUNTING, ROLE_FACTORY, ROLE_SALES, ROLE_DEALER with permissions arrays.

steps.expected: Role, Key, Permissions, Description columns visible
steps.observed: DataTable shows 4 columns: Role (with name + System badge for admin), Key (ROLE_ADMIN etc), Permissions (count), Description

5 roles visible: Administrator (ROLE_ADMIN, 7 perms), Accounting (ROLE_ACCOUNTING, 3 perms), Factory (ROLE_FACTORY, 3 perms), Sales (ROLE_SALES, 1 perm), Dealer portal (ROLE_DEALER, 1 perm). Pagination shows '1–5 of 5'.

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/admin/roles → 200 (verified via browser fetch with auth token)

assertions.title: Role detail opens on row click

steps.action: Click 'View role details' button on Administrator row
steps.observed: Drawer dialog opened with heading 'Administrator' and subtitle 'ROLE_ADMIN'

steps.expected: Shows role name, key, description, permissions list, dates
steps.observed: Drawer shows: role name 'Administrator', key 'ROLE_ADMIN', System badge, Description section ('Administrator'), Permissions section (7 permissions: portal:factory, dispatch.confirm, payroll.run, factory.dispatch, portal:accounting, portal:dealer, portal:sales). Dates section conditionally renders (none present for this role data).
Drawer closed successfully. Dialog element no longer present in accessibility tree.

evidence.network: no additional API calls (drawer uses cached data)

steps.expected: Table filters to show only matching roles
steps.observed: Table filtered to 1 role: Administrator (ROLE_ADMIN). Pagination shows '1–1 of 1'.

steps.action: Clear and type 'FACTORY' in search input
steps.expected: Table filters by key matching FACTORY
steps.observed: Table filtered to 1 role: Factory (ROLE_FACTORY). Pagination shows '1–1 of 1'. Search works by role key.
All 5 roles restored. Pagination shows '1–5 of 5'.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. Roles page loads with real backend data via GET /api/v1/admin/roles → 200. DataTable displays Role, Key, Permissions, Description columns with 5 roles. Detail drawer opens on row click showing role name, key, description, permissions list. Close button works. Search filters by role name and key correctly; clearing restores all roles. No console errors observed.
